meaning: adj.动人的,吸引人的,迷人的
examples: Sue was sitting up in bed, looking very fetching in a flowered bedjacket.
I remember him fetching you lemonade.
Lina saw this and said, "Listen, old Sanna, why are you fetching so much water?"
He explained that sheep were being targeted because of the high prices they are currently fetching.
It needs more than money and marketing and a fetching smile on a screen.
